# SpaGCN spatial domain detection dependencies
# Install with: pip install -r requirements.txt
#
# NOTE: Install PyTorch first following https://pytorch.org/ for your CUDA version.

# Core dependencies
scanpy>=1.10.0
anndata>=0.10.0
numpy>=1.24.0
pandas>=2.0.0
matplotlib>=3.7.0
seaborn>=0.11.0
scikit-learn>=1.0.0
scipy>=1.7.0

# PyTorch
torch>=1.12.0

# SpaGCN
# Install from GitHub: pip install SpaGCN
# Or: pip install git+https://github.com/jianhuupenn/SpaGCN.git
SpaGCN
